message:
refactor(interactive): extract AutocompleteState to state submodule

Continue the interactive module decomposition by moving AutocompleteState
struct and its implementation (new(), update(), clear(), selected_item(),
select_next(), select_prev()) from the parent interactive.rs into
interactive/state.rs where the other TUI state types live.

Also cleans up imports: removes unused AutocompleteProvider and
AutocompleteResponse from the parent module imports, and reorders
use statements for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
